title: tengine.checkpoint.captured v1
description: Snapshot blob captured to the CAS (content-addressed store) after WT 645 (svdag_noise_direct) reached ready, emitted by the C courier (ext_checkpoint_cache.c, bead lkxk4). Part of the warmup-snapshot-cache surface (epic 9neza, kudbl). Producer: registry handle CHECKPOINT_CAPTURED in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs. CloudEvents subject is the chain name (e.g. 'svdag').

chain.description: Warmup chain name this snapshot belongs to (e.g. 'svdag').

key_spirv.description: Cache key component derived from the SPIR-V shader hash in effect at capture time.

key_seed.description: Cache key component derived from the world-generation seed in effect at capture time.

payload_bytes.description: Size of the captured snapshot blob, in bytes.

checksum.description: Content checksum of the snapshot blob, used to verify integrity on restore.

slot.description: GPU pool buffer slot the snapshot was captured from.

path_hash.description: Hash of the CAS storage path for this blob.
